title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC have updates
scenario: Verify language update during a 1-step DFU when both Earbuds and Charge Case have updates available
steps: Start app with Osprey EB and CC (both at least version 5039) with updates available for both.
Check language on Charge Case via touch screen menus.
expected: Software update screen is displayed. Language change and DFU finish successfully; Earbuds and Charge Case are on latest firmware. Language was properly changed for Charge Case.
